violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in the hot holding box. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2026
Gaskets for hot holding unit were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and printed discoloration. Residue observed on wall from ceiling. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
Gaskets for the chest freezer and hot holding unit were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2025

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and printed discoloration. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
Handwashing sink was observed draining water slowly. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2024

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and printed discoloration. Vents in kitchen observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Hamburgers were observed recently removed from oven and actively being assembled at 138 degrees Fahrenheit. Ground beef must be cooked to 155 degrees Fahrenheit or more for 15 seconds. Foods were reheated between 174-190 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Foods must be checked with a thermometer to verify for correct cooking temperatures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Hamburgers was observed held at 112-116 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were reheated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

Bean salad, dressed squash, and roasted potatoes were observed held at 52-61 degrees Fahrenheit in salad bar with no mediums or equipment to keep food cold. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Roasted potatoes were cooked at 07:30 this morning- roasted potatoes were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Other foods were placed into freezer to blast chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The ceiling tiles in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and printed discoloration. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
2 door reach-in unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
2 door reach-in unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
2 door reach-in unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the AC vents above the preparation unit and dishwasher area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
